name: smart-crawler
description: Cross-border e-commerce intelligence + Reddit community analysis. Crawl competitor products/prices/promotions, VOC reviews, Google Shopping landscape, and Reddit subreddit playbooks — all via MCP tools.

tools.name: reddit_subreddit_playbook
tools.description: Generate a full growth playbook for top N contributors of any subreddit. Pipeline: find contributors → fetch post/comment history → LLM analysis → structured playbook (growth timeline, content formula, 5-step replicable path).

top_n.description: Number of top contributors to analyze

tools.name: reddit_top_contributors
tools.description: Find top N contributors in a subreddit ranked by post count × score. Returns username, karma, account age, and post stats.

tools.name: reddit_user_activity
tools.description: Fetch complete post + comment history for a Reddit user. Returns profile stats, top posts, monthly activity timeline. Includes deleted posts via Arctic Shift archive.

tools.name: search_competitor_products
tools.description: Search competitor product catalog. Filter by brand (SONGMICS/Costway/Homary/Vidaxl), country, keyword, category, price range, or promotion status.

tools.name: get_voc_reviews
tools.description: Fetch consumer VOC reviews from Trustpilot/Reviews.io/Google Maps. Filter by platform, sentiment, rating.

tools.name: amazon_voc_report
tools.description: Fetch Amazon reviews for an ASIN and generate AI VOC analysis: sentiment, pain points, highlights, listing optimization suggestions.

tools.name: competitor_landscape
tools.description: Google Shopping competitive landscape for a keyword — merchant share rankings.

tools.name: list_data_sources
tools.description: List all available data sources: 46 competitor sites + review platforms + Google Shopping.
